parsed.cleanedTranscript:
Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
Speaker 1: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
Speaker 2: Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.
Raul Menendez: On an unprecedented scale.
Speaker 2: Menendez is a terrorist.
Raul Menendez: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
Speaker 2: He refuses to let me go.
Raul Menendez: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
Speaker 2: A lot of people counting on us for answers.
Raul Menendez: You have no idea what you've done.
David: I know exactly what I've done, Menendez.
Raul Menendez: This is just the beginning of your suffering.
David: Specter One, report!
David: Need a sitrep!
David: This isn't real.
Raul Menendez: The hell it ain't!
David: Pull it together, man!
Menendez: So eager to leave, David.
Menendez: Killing the man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
David: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
David: No more games. This ends now.
Announcer: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

auditTrail.detail: Kept generic 'Speaker 1' and 'Speaker 2' labels where identity was not explicit in the transcript; preserved named speakers where provided.
Capitalized Menendez's boundary-continuation line to read 'On an unprecedented scale.'
Combined chunk transcripts in chronological order with no duplicated boundary dialogue detected.
Kept the in-audio promotional advertisement as part of the transcript because it is present in the source audio.

debug.notes: Mechanical transcript stitched directly; no overlapping duplicate lines were present at chunk boundaries. Chunk 7 contained no speech. Speaker labels were normalized only for consistency of capitalization and naming as already present in source lines.
